calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The cause came as a reassignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for court trial.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
Appearances:
Francisco G. Torres, Esq. for plaintiff Conrad House, Inc., with plaintiff's witness, Eliah Borenstein, property manager was sworn and examined.
No appearance by defendant Donald Kempter.
The court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Back rent due: $275.52
Per Diem damages: $487.80
Costs: $235.30 for a Total of $998.62

The rental agreement is forfeited, and restitution and possession of the premises located at 35 Woodward Street, Unit 212, San Francisco, CA is further ordered.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Continued To Oct-20-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2003 Off Calendar
